arts.ttl: Arsenal signal interest in RB Leipzig’s Amadou Haidara
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly again interested in picking up Malian international Amadou Haidara from RB Leipzig.

arts.ttl: 12 players to miss Arsenal vs Real Madrid as Mikel Arteta feels impact of injury crisis
arts.sum: Arsenal and Real Madrid will both be missing six players when they clash at the Emirates, with both sides hoping to reach the semi-finals of this year's Champions League

arts.ttl: Five players who could join Real Madrid this summer
arts.sum: Bournemouth defender Dean Huijsen has emerged as a key transfer target for Real Madrid in recent weeks amid his immense form under Andoni Iraola. Real Madrid have enjoyed an incredible success rate in the transfer market in recent years and they will aim to complete yet more impressive business this summer.

arts.ttl: Arsenal owner Stan Kroenke net worth rockets again ahead of crucial summer transfer window
arts.sum: His rise in personal wealth comes ahead of a crucial time for Arsenal with a big summer transfer window on the horizon as Mikel Arteta's side look to strengthen their ranks with signings in attack. Stan Kroenke has seen his net worth grow higher than ever this year as the Arsenal owner is close to becoming one of the 100 richest people in the world.

arts.ttl: Aaron Ramsdale sends new message as unwanted Arsenal reunion nears amid £13m transfer update
arts.sum: The 26-year-old departed Emirates Stadium last summer for an initial £18million, 12 months on from David Raya joining on loan with his permanent move to Arsenal confirmed ahead of the 2024/25 season. "Thank you for sticking with us [red heart emoji]." As Ramsdale mentions, there are still games left to play and one of those, that is on the final day of the season, comes against his former club .

arts.ttl: Arsenal owner Stan Kroenke commits to £7.8bn investment in another team
arts.sum: Kroenke Sports & Entertainment, the holding company which owns the Gunners, unveiled plans on Monday for a new 52-acre development for the KSE-owned NFL team, the Los Angeles Rams, with the price of the project set to reach $10bn (£7.8bn). The development, part of the 100-acres acquired by KSE in 2022 at the Warner Center in Woodland Hills, will include the permanent headquarters and training facility for the Rams.

arts.ttl: Where are they now from Arsenal's last meeting with Real Madrid in 2006? A goalkeeper involved in chainsaw attack on neighbour's house, owner of multi-billion pound company and the forward who tragically died in a car crash
arts.sum: These two sides have only been drawn against one another once in the entire history of the Champions League, with the Gunners defying the odds to beat the Spanish titans back in 2006.

arts.ttl: £55m Arsenal target now decides he wants to stay at his club and sign a new contract - journalist

arts.ttl: Predicted Teams Arsenal-Real Madrid: Carlo Ancelotti’s experiment and holes to fill for Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: Real Madrid face Arsenal at the Emirates in the first leg of their Champions League quarter-final on Tuesday evening at 21:00 CEST, with Carlo Ancelotti under pressure following a damaging defeat to Valencia. Both sides are missing key players through injury.
